questions.question: Foundation эффективного rollback в Flink production — что это?

options.text: Pre-upgrade savepoint автоматически created Operator-ом при upgradeMode: savepoint. Этот savepoint = rollback artifact. Без него rollback impossible — нет state pre-upgrade. Retention: 30 дней минимум для critical jobs

questions.explanation: Pre-upgrade savepoint — foundation. Flink Kubernetes Operator с upgradeMode: savepoint автоматически triggers savepoint перед image change. Этот savepoint = exact state pre-upgrade. Rollback workflow: revert FlinkDeployment к previous image + initialSavepointPath = pre-upgrade savepoint → operator делает restart с previous state. Без savepoint retention = no rollback possible. Configure spec.flinkConfiguration.execution.checkpointing.externalized-checkpoint-retention: RETAIN_ON_CANCELLATION + savepointHistory retention. Critical jobs need 30+ days retention for late-detected issues.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Foundation: kept savepoint before upgrade + Retention policy

questions.question: Friday 16:00 deploy v1.43. Monday 09:00 detect bug (false positives slow weekend growth). Rollback к v1.42. Challenges?

options.text: (1) Pre-upgrade savepoint 65h old — retention должен покрывать; (2) Data forward time — 65h events будут reprocessed v1.42 → downstream duplicates, EOS sink transactional ID bump required чтобы избежать 2PC conflicts; (3) Kafka log retention — events expired могут отсутствовать; (4) Downstream coordination — alerts may include false positives + duplicates

questions.explanation: Multi-layer challenges. Pre-upgrade savepoint retention — default 7-30 дней obычно OK. Data replay — 65h events будут reprocessed (savepoint Kafka offsets от Friday) → downstream sees duplicates, EOS sink transactional IDs collide с v1.43 committed transactions (need bump prefix to e.g., 'fraud-detector-tx-v2'). Kafka log retention — если log retention < 65h, some events expired = state can't fully rebuild — gap. Forward compatibility — pre-upgrade savepoint has old schema, v1.42 reads fine. Decision: rollback vs forward fix (v1.43.1 hotfix). Depends на bug severity, downstream tolerance. Coordination: notify ops, business about alert duplicates. Post-mortem: better canary, deploy windowing.
questions.studyHint: Повторите урок — Forward compatibility traps + KnowledgeCheck

questions.question: Quarterly drill — что это и зачем?

options.text: Regular exercise rollback procedure на staging — simulate upgrade gone wrong, execute runbook, time RTO, identify gaps, update procedures. Без drill процедура decays (S3 paths drift, IAM rotates, runbook stale). Untested DR/rollback = no DR/rollback

questions.explanation: Critical practice. Untested rollback procedure decays — S3 bucket paths изменились, IAM rotations broke permissions, runbook ссылается на устаревшие tool versions, team forgets steps. Quarterly drill: (1) simulate upgrade gone wrong на staging (deploy intentional bad image); (2) execute rollback runbook step-by-step; (3) measure actual RTO (target <30 min); (4) identify gaps в documentation; (5) train junior engineers. Drill artifacts — updated runbook, RTO metrics, fix tickets. Real incident — first time team executes procedure = chaos. Drill ensures procedure works when really needed.

questions.question: При rollback с Exactly-Once Kafka sink ВСЕГДА bump transactional.id.prefix — иначе rollback replays events с теми же transactional IDs что v1.43 уже committed → 2PC conflicts.
questions.explanation: True. EOS Kafka sink uses Two-Phase Commit с unique transactional IDs (prefix + subtask suffix). Pre-upgrade savepoint Kafka offsets = от Friday. Rollback к v1.42 + Friday savepoint = reprocess Friday→Monday events. Kafka EOS sink commits transactions с same transactional.id.prefix as v1.43 used → broker sees conflict (transactional ID already в active state or differently committed) → 2PC fails, sink crashes. Fix: bump transactional.id.prefix at rollback (e.g., add '-rollback-v1' suffix). New prefix = new transaction coordinator state, no conflicts. Important checklist item для EOS rollbacks.
